name: Shower
when_to_use: 需要 HTML-first 的 list/full 双模式演示并兼顾浏览与打印时用它而非手写模式切换和键盘状态,因为原生手写在双模式布局、逐步内容与打印分页上失败;非做 Markdown 编译器或自由画布编辑器。
why_valuable: AI 默认能排静态 slide,但做不到稳定的 list/full 状态机、键盘与触摸导航、逐步内容、进度和打印模式协作;Shower core 把这些行为绑定到简洁的 .slide HTML。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing mode switching and keyboard state when you need an HTML-first presentation with list/full modes that supports browsing and printing, because native implementations fail at dual-mode layout, incremental content, and print pagination; not a Markdown compiler or free-form canvas editor.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally lay out static slides but cannot reliably coordinate a list/full state machine, keyboard and touch navigation, incremental content, progress, and print mode; Shower core binds these behaviors to concise .slide HTML.

data_in.note: core includes no theme; boot supplies official Ribbon CSS. Shower.start finds its root with document.querySelector(containerSelector), so it can mount only in an exclusive document.

schema.html: string -- inner HTML of the .shower root; every slide must be a direct child <section class="slide">, class="next" marks incremental content within a slide, and it may contain <progress class="progress">

spec.note: The Ribbon theme is designed around 1024x576 slide geometry; the host iframe defaults to an explicit 576px height and permits vertical scrolling in list mode. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in._why_no_example: 语义 HTML 是 AI 原生记法;.slide/.next/.progress 结构已由 schema 钉死,无需 minimal example。
data_in.note: core 不含主题;boot 配一份官方 Ribbon CSS。Shower.start 通过 document.querySelector(containerSelector) 找根,所以只能在独占 document 中 mount。

schema.html: string —— .shower 根的内部 HTML;每页必须是直接后代 <section class="slide">,页内 class="next" 表示逐步内容,可含 <progress class="progress">

spec.note: Ribbon 主题按 1024×576 幻灯几何设计;宿主 iframe 默认给明确 576px 高并允许 list 模式纵向滚动,禁止 vh/百分比高。

boot.widget: unsupported:Shower.start 固定从 document.querySelector 找容器,无法穿过 shadowRoot;主题还有 full/list/print 的 document 级选择器

peer.note: @shower/core 明确不含主题;boot 使用官方 Ribbon 主题 @4/styles/index.css。若换 Material,只替换主题 CSS,不要改 core mount API。

carriers.widget: unsupported:document 查询、history/location 与全局主题样式无法收束到 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:独占 sandbox iframe 可容纳 document/history/打印能力;主题 CSS 进入 iframe head

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr @shower/core@3.6.0: boot correctly avoids the +esm entry (its export list is EMPTY — reads document.currentScript) and imports lib/shower.js which is `export default Shower` / `class Shower extends EventTarget { constructor(options) }`. `containerSelector` is a real default-options.js key (default '.shower'); `start()` exists and calls `document.querySelector(containerSelector)` (shower.js:42) — this is the concrete disqualifier for shadow DOM (container must live in the main document, unreachable inside shadowRoot), backing widget:unsupported. Isolation: core itself injects no style, but the deck REQUIRES an external theme — boot appends @shower/ribbon link to document.head, and Ribbon uses document-level .full/.list/.print selectors (globalStyleInjection yes). modules/location.js uses history.pushState/replaceState + window popstate listener + location.hash/href/pathname/search; modules/touch.js binds a document listener (globalEvents yes). keys/mouse bind to the container, not document. codex/artifact (own document) supported and honestly marked.

minimal.html:
Designing with Shower

Slides that are just HTML

Designing with Shower

Why HTML Slides?

Every slide is a plain <section class="slide">. No proprietary format and no lock-in — your deck is just semantic markup.

The core handles list and full modes, keyboard and touch navigation, and print pagination for you.

Themes do the visual work; you write the content.

Reveal Step by Step

  1. Write the content as ordinary HTML
  2. Tag a line with class="next"
  3. Press the arrow keys to reveal it
  4. Print mode paginates automatically

Thank You
